creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I'm here via <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-questions/2022-November/002411.html>. Whilst here, triage: 

* lower the priority, in accordance with 
  <https://wiki.freebsd.org/Bugzilla/TriageTraining>

* assume that a fix (if any) will not be merged to stable/12 before the 
  end of its life; 12.4, expected four days from now, will be the final 
  RELEASE from this branch.
